title: Section 502
content: Save as provided in this Act, nothing contained in this Act shall be construed as authorising the disregard by 1[2[the Corporation]] or any municipal authority or any municipal officer or other municipal employee of any law for the time being in force.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, s. 2, for “the Corporation” (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). 2. Subs. by Act 10 of 2022, s. 2, for “a Corporation” (w.e.f. 22-5-2022).
